name: The Key to Going Linear: Analysis-Driven Transformer Linearization
content: The quadratic cost of causal self-attention severely bottlenecks long-context transformer inference. While numerous post hoc linearization pipelines exist, it is difficult to identify which components preserve model quality. This work isolates the effect of state update design in a strict frozen-backbone regime. We show that softmax relies on key-dependent, rank-1 orthogonal projections, elucidating why delta-style networks outperform purely gated accumulation. We identify a potential source of
summary: 通过分析关键依赖项，该研究揭示了softmax在因果自我注意中的关键作用，并提出了一些减少线性化误差的方法。这些方法显著提高了LLaMA和Qwen模型的性能。
key_insights: 研究发现softmax依赖于关键依赖项和秩1正交投影，这解释了为什么delta风格网络优于纯门控累积。
提出了sink tokens、短卷积和固定预算缓存路由等结构干预措施来减少线性化误差。
在32亿参数的LLaMA和Qwen模型上实现了性能提升，并且在MMLU任务中超过了之前的后验基线，同时与复杂的自适应缓存框架相比，在长上下文检索方面表现相当。
xihe_relevance: 该研究方法可能对曦和中的记忆系统或自反层有潜在价值。
